title: oxalis fragrans
intro: Oxalis fragrans, also known as the fragrant woodsorrel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Oxalidaceae family. The plant contains oxalic acid, a compound with medicinal properties that has been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Oxalis fragrans have been traditionally used to treat conditions such as digestive issues, inflammation, and skin irritations, and its health benefits include antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Oxalis fragrans is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which are used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
